text:
Once upon a time, there was a charming little gnome named Glom.

Glom lived in a cozy cottage nestled among towering pines and babbling brooks. He loved his quiet life, spending his days tending greens and collecting the sweetest, juiciest berries. His cottage was lit by the soft glow of lanterns hanging from the ceiling, and the gentle chitter-chatter of his feathered friends kept the air lively.

One dewy morning, as Glom was watering his flowers, he heard a curious rustling in the bushes. Drawing back the leaves, he was surprised to see a squirrel peeking nervously through.

"Hello, little friend," Glom greeted warmly. "You seem quite distressed. What's going on?"

The squirrel shook its tiny head.

"Badgers," the squirrel whispered, pointing down.

Glom frowned. "Badgers?" he repeated. "Now why would badgers be after me?"

The squirrel chattered, hopping away. "
